title: ［突發］歐洲議會聽日會根據Rule 144 討論香港

replies.msg:
Rule 144 of the Rules of Procedure 係debate on cases of breach of human rights, democracy and the rule of law - 即係關於違反人權，損害民主同法治嘅事。動議係由Green/ALE嘅MEPs 提出嘅。 動議背景建基於由Victor Mallet 嘅簽證不獲續期到逃犯條例修訂產生嘅爭議同示威，顯示到香港嘅一國兩制同人權受到挑戰。

動議內容包括我地五大訴求入面嘅成立獨立調查委員會，正式撒回修訂，撤銷暴動定性。同時亦提出譴責中國不斷干預香港內政同要中國尊重中英聯合聲明嘅合法性等等。

大家有興趣的話我可以翻譯下份motion 俾大家睇下，聽日我亦會留意住個live

呢個motion 係由Green/ALE嘅MEPs 提出，Green/ALE可以話係今年選舉嘅贏家之一。


http://www.europarl.europa.eu/doceo/document/B-9-2019-0013_EN.html

唔好意思 姐係點
有咩可以做
定係等消息
歐盟收香港難民未？
佢地要唔要聽香港人既聲音

大家等等，我翻譯嘅份野做中文。

但聽日18嘅 歐洲議會會開以Rule144 為基礎討論香港事務。大家可以睇下份motion，之後絕對可以聯絡負責提出呢個Motion 嘅MEPs，亦可以係個debate時睇下有邊個MEPs 係我地可以reach out 嘅，因為聽日只係first reading

其實B9‑0013/2019係齊五大訴求㗎
不過有啲冇咁強硬
3. Notes the announcement on 9 July by Honk Kong Chief Executive Carrie Lam that the amendment to the Ordinance was “dead” and that the attempt by her government to pass such extradition legislation was “a total failure”; urges, however, the Hong Kong government to formally withdraw the proposed extradition bill;
促請撤回
4. Urges the Hong Kong authorities to follow up on the announcement by the Independent Police Complaints Council to investigate the police action during mass protest by establishing an independent investigation on excessive use of force both during the most recent protests but also retroactively in all previous cases;
促請獨立調查
8. Supports civil society in requesting to revisit the definition of the 12 June protest as riots, particularly since there have been many reports that police’s brutality has provoked the escalation in the protests; regrets Carrie Lam declaring that protests fall in the scope of riots and urges the leadership of Hong Kong to abstain from any action and public statements that could provoke escalations;
支持社會要求平反暴動
5. Urges the Hong Kong authorities to release and drop all charges against peaceful protesters, and all those detained during or in the lead to protests for the peaceful exercise of their freedom of expression;
促請撤銷檢控
16. Calls on the EEAS, the Commission and the Member States to commit fully to continue supporting and closely monitoring Hong Kong’s democratic development, aiming at a systematic reform to implement direct elections of the Chief Executive and the LegCo as enshrined in the Basic Law and reach an agreement on an election system that is overall democratic, fair, open, transparent and granting the people of the SAR the right to elect and to be elected in the selection process for all leadership positions;

14. Reiterates that any legislation introduced under the Basic Law, including any legislation to be proposed on the basis of Article 23 of the Basic Law such as a possible National Security Bill, must not interfere with the independence and exclusive jurisdiction of the Hong Kong judiciary and should not undermine obligations under the International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights (ICESCR), nor should it undermine freedoms such as freedom of speech, media freedoms, freedom of association and assembly, freedom of demonstration, freedom to form trade unions and to strike, and freedom of academic research and cultural and artistic expression, and should not be used to target human rights activists and government critics;

15. Underlines the EU’s commitment to strengthening democracy, including the rule of law, the independence of the judiciary, fundamental freedoms and rights, transparency, and freedom of information and expression in Hong Kong;

16. Calls on the EEAS, the Commission and the Member States to commit fully to continue supporting and closely monitoring Hong Kong’s democratic development, aiming at a systematic reform to implement direct elections of the Chief Executive and the LegCo as enshrined in the Basic Law and reach an agreement on an election system that is overall democratic, fair, open, transparent and granting the people of the SAR the right to elect and to be elected in the selection process for all leadership positions;

17. Calls on the Commission and the EEAS to swiftly put in place measures to halt all export of crowd control equipment and “non-lethal” weaponry, which may be used by the Hong Kong policy and to mainstream such measures in the overall EU strategy on Hong Kong;

18. Instructs its President to forward this recommendation to the Council, the Commission and the Vice‑President of the Commission / High Representative of the Union for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy and, for information, to the Government of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region and the Government of the People’s Republic of China.

好簡單咁講下有乜嘢內容

第一項係呼籲香港政府正式撤回逃犯修訂條例

第二項呼籲香港政府立即釋放所有和平嘅示威者同埋撤銷所有相關人士因為和平示威而被控嘅罪行

第三項係呼籲香港政府成立一個獨立、公正、有效嘅調查，調查重點係會關於香港警隊對於示威者所使用嘅武力

第四項係強調歐盟同好多香港市民一樣，對於呢一個逃犯修訂條例都表達好深嘅關注

第五項係呼籲香港去確保一切嘅條例都係符合國際人權裏面提到嘅權利

第六項係歐盟承認香港係呢幾個禮拜見到前所未有咁多人出嚟去遊行

第七項係關於對新聞自由，公民權利，同埋政治權利喺香港每況愈下表達關注

第八項強調係基本法之下香港係擁有言論自由同出版自由等，亦都有遊行集會嘅自由。呼籲香港及中國政府保障基本法之下所提出嘅人權同自由

第九項係強烈譴責中國持續而不斷增加地對香港嘅內政有所干預，亦強烈譴責中國近期對於中英聯合聲明嘅定性。強調中英聯合聲明係有效嘅而中國政府係收到呢份聲明約束去保持香港嘅高度自治

quote.msg:
Rule 144 of the Rules of Procedure 係debate on cases of breach of human rights, democracy and the rule of law - 即係關於違反人權，損害民主同法治嘅事。動議係由Green/ALE嘅MEPs 提出嘅。 動議背景建基於由Victor Mallet 嘅簽證不獲續期到逃犯條例修訂產生嘅爭議同示威，顯示到香港嘅一國兩制同人權受到挑戰。

動議內容包括我地五大訴求入面嘅成立獨立調查委員會，正式撒回修訂，撤銷暴動定性。同時亦提出譴責中國不斷干預香港內政同要中國尊重中英聯合聲明嘅合法性等等。

大家有興趣的話我可以翻譯下份motion 俾大家睇下，聽日我亦會留意住個live

呢個motion 係由Green/ALE嘅MEPs 提出，Green/ALE可以話係今年選舉嘅贏家之一。


http://www.europarl.europa.eu/doceo/document/B-9-2019-0013_EN.html

replies.msg: 邊到 幾點有live睇

第十項係歐盟深切關注到有反對派嘅候選人係呢一個大環境下唔俾去參與立法會選舉

第十一項係呼籲歐盟，歐盟成員國，以及國際社會共同合作去推動一個適當嘅出口管制機制，以此保障到中國尤其香港唔能夠得到違反基本權利嘅科技 （this sentence has been very clearly crafted in English)

11. Calls for the EU, its Member States and the international community to work towards the imposition of appropriate export control mechanisms to deny China, and in particular Hong Kong, access to technologies used to violate basic rights;

第12項係關於循序漸進，有系統地根據基本法落實雙普選

第13項係再次呼籲中國立即釋放桂民海

第14項係強調區行對於香港民主嘅重視

第15項係關於中國嘅人權問題

第16項係呼籲歐盟外交安全政策高級代表，幫忙對外事務部以及係歐盟成員國共同以上嘅問題表達關注，同時亦呼籲同中國政府同埋香港政府保持對話

第17項 unimportant

大家有興趣的話我可以翻譯下份motion 俾大家睇下，聽日我亦會留意住個live
